ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight leg */,
  "leg_number" TEXT /* Identifier for the leg within the flight path */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the flight */,
  "aircraft_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the aircraft assigned to the flight */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the flight */,
  "airport_departure" TEXT /* IATA code of the departure airport */,
  "date_departure" TEXT /* Scheduled date of departure */,
  "hour_departure" TEXT /* Scheduled time of departure */,
  "actual_departure_time" TEXT /* Actual time of departure */,
  "airport_arrival" TEXT /* IATA code of the arrival airport */,
  "date_arrival" TEXT /* Scheduled date of arrival */,
  "hour_arrival" TEXT /* Scheduled time of arrival */,
  "actual_arrival_time" TEXT /* Actual time of arrival */,
  "gate_departure" TEXT /* Gate number at the departure airport */,
  "gate_arrival" TEXT /* Gate number at the arrival airport */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the route of the flight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_airport_departure FOREIGN KEY ("airport_departure") REFERENCES airports ("airport_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_airport_arrival FOREIGN KEY ("airport_arrival") REFERENCES airports ("airport_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_code" TEXT /* IATA code of the airport */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Full name of the airport */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the airport */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the airport */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the airport */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the airport above sea level */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the airport */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system login */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., pilot, ground crew, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated flight leg */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event logged (e.g., departure, arrival, delay) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event occurred */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user who logged the event */,
  "status_before" TEXT /* Status of the flight before the event */,
  "status_after" TEXT /* Status of the flight after the event */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Additional remarks or notes about the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_logs_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the route */,
  "departure_airport" TEXT /* IATA code of the departure airport */,
  "arrival_airport" TEXT /* IATA code of the arrival airport */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Estimated flight duration in minutes */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance between the departure and arrival airports in kilometers */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the route (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* A metric indicating the popularity of the route */,
  "operational_efficiency" REAL /* A metric indicating the operational efficiency of the route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_arrival_airport FOREIGN KEY ("arrival_airport") REFERENCES airports ("airport_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_departure_airport FOREIGN KEY ("departure_airport") REFERENCES airports ("airport_code")
)
